name: Peach Walnut Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch square pan.
3. In a bowl, mix molasses thoroughly with the beaten eggs.
4. Peel and chop the peaches, then stir them into the mixture.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients (flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, chopped walnuts) in another bowl and stir until smooth.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the molasses mixture and combine thoroughly.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Let cool before cutting into squares.
10. Top with whipped cream and peach slices if desired. Makes 1 cake.
